heading: Application
label: 5356 Application
text: The application required by this part shall disclose, as regulations issued by the Secretary shall provide, such information as may be necessary to enable the Secretary to determine the location and extent of the premises, the type of operations to be conducted on such premises, and whether the operations will be in conformity with law and regulations.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 5356, , , consisted of provisions similar to those comprising this section, prior to the general revision of this chapter by .act Aug. 16, 1954, ch. 73668A Stat. 664Pub. L. 85–859
Amendments1976— struck out “or his delegate” after “Secretary” wherever appearing.Pub. L. 94–455
